title: ophrys sphegodes subsp. spruneri
intro: Ophrys sphegodes subsp. spruneri, also known as the bee orchid, is a sub-species of the ophrys sphegodes plant, which belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of ophrys sphegodes subsp. spruneri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
